---
title: "Hambee Makinoda" 
image: mypic.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 17em
  links:
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
  - icon: github
    text: GitHub
    href: https://github.com/Hambanana0923
  - icon: email
    text: Email
    href: mailto:hambee@ucsb.edu
  - icon: instagram
    text: Instagram
    href: https://www.instagram.com/hambee_m/
---

My name is Hambee Makinoda (Pronounced "Han-bay"). I am third year Environmental Studies and Biological Sciences B.S. major at UCSB.

## Education 

University of California, Santa Barbara \| Santa Barbara, CA

Bachelor of Science: Environmental Studies & Biological Sciences \| Sep 2023 - Jun 2027

## Current Experience 

Institute for Energy Efficiency \| Research Assistant \| Feb 2026 - Present

Solaris Trailer \| Marketing Intern \| Aug 2025 - Present

Nikkei Student Union @ UCSB \| Vice President \| Sep 2024 - Present
